response:
Here's a list of ingredients for a basic salad in checkbox format:

- [ ] Lettuce (romaine, iceberg, or mixed greens)
- [ ] Tomatoes
- [ ] Cucumber
- [ ] Red onion
- [ ] Carrots
- [ ] Bell peppers
- [ ] Radishes
- [ ] Croutons
- [ ] Cheese (feta, parmesan, or cheddar)
- [ ] Olives
- [ ] Salt
- [ ] Pepper
- [ ] Olive oil
- [ ] Vinegar or lemon juice
- [ ] Salad dressing (of choice)

Feel free to mix and match based on your preferences! 🥗
